name: punta-venta
description: Monorepo de Punta Venta: gestión web de ventas por vendedores, inventario, productos y reportes.

scripts.build: npm run api:prisma:generate && npm run api:build && npm run web:build
scripts.dev:bootstrap: npm run dev:db && npm run api:prisma:generate && npm --prefix apps/api run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm --prefix apps/api run seed && npm run dev:doctor
scripts.dev:db: docker compose stop api web && docker compose up -d postgres
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d postgres api web
scripts.format:check: npm run api:format:check && npm run web:format:check
scripts.lint: npm run api:lint && npm run web:lint
scripts.qa:critical: npm run qa:guardrails && npm run api:test:critical && npm run web:test:critical
scripts.qa:full: npm run qa:local && npm run web:e2e:integration:list && npm run web:e2e:integration && npm run docker:config && npm run docker:build
scripts.qa:guardrails: npm run ci:check-node-version && npm run ci:validate-lockfiles && npm run ci:check-generated-artifacts && npm run ci:check-sensitive-files && npm run ci:check-test-guardrails && npm run ci:check-scripts && npm run lint
scripts.qa:local: npm run qa:guardrails && npm run api:prisma:generate && npm run api:prisma:validate && npm run api:build && npm run api:test:critical && npm run web:test && npm run web:test:critical && npm run web:build && npm run web:bundle:audit && npm run web:e2e:list && npm run web:e2e
scripts.test: npm run api:test && npm run web:test
scripts.typecheck: npm run api:typecheck && npm run web:typecheck
